prompt: A warm cinematic 360-degree panoramic interior of a cozy café at night, rendered as an immersive equirectangular wide scene with slight fisheye distortion from the panoramic format. The setting is a stylish, softly lit coffee shop with polished wooden floors, curved ceiling details, hanging pendant lamps, bookshelves, plants, small tables, and large rain-speckled windows showing city lights outside. The atmosphere is amber, intimate, and realistic, like a lifestyle panorama photographed indoors on a rainy evening. Populate the scene with exactly 8 appearances of the same young woman, creating a multi-instance storytelling composition across the café. In the center foreground, one version of the woman stands closest to camera and reaches forward with both hands, offering a cup of coffee in one hand and a plate of cut fruit in the other, making direct eye-level engagement. On the far left, a second version operates an espresso machine behind the counter, dressed casually like a barista. Left of center, a third version stands reading or reviewing papers near the bookshelf. In the back center-right, a fourth version stands near a camera tripod, looking at a phone or small device as if preparing content or checking notes. Mid-right, a fifth version sits at a table holding printed pages. Right of her, a sixth version leans over to speak with a seated seventh version who is working at an open laptop with papers spread across the table. On the far right by the window, an eighth version stands in a long light-colored coat, gazing inward. Keep all 8 women visually consistent as the same person with a young East Asian woman with long wavy dark hair and a slim build, but vary outfit layering slightly in soft neutral loungewear and casual café attire in cream, beige, gray, and lavender tones. Include visible props: 1 espresso machine, 1 laptop, 1 camera tripod, multiple sheets of paper, 2 cups on tables plus the 1 cup being offered, and 1 small vase of flowers on the right table. Emphasize natural candid poses, environmental storytelling, realistic indoor reflections, low-key tungsten lighting, rainy window highlights, and a welcoming café-workspace mood. Style: ultra-realistic photography, high detail, soft shadows, warm color grading, documentary lifestyle realism. Aspect ratio very wide panoramic, suitable for a full panoramic background or immersive scene.
